response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist engineer with deep experience in D, TypeScript/Node.js, and web platforms, but does not meet the core requirements of this role. His hands-on C++ experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years on Windows. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL instead), and no fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain background — RIDE Capital was retail-investment fintech, not investment banking. The low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby shows relevant engineering aptitude, but the skills gap on the mandatory criteria is too wide.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Broad polyglot background with some C/C++ exposure and systems-level work
concerns: C++ experience is brief and dated (~6 months in 2014–2015), not the required 5–10 years on Windows
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
